description_long: This is a large, rustic cabin surrounded by a ring of tall, slender pine trees, set on a circular grassy plot. The cabin features a sprawling, multi-sectioned layout with a dark, complex gabled roof and prominent wooden beams visible along the facades. Multiple windows line the exterior, grouped in sets beneath the roof overhangs, providing ample natural light and a symmetrical appearance. The main entrance is marked by a covered porch area, with stone or paved walkways leading up to it. The structure is primarily constructed from timber, with stone or masonry elements at the base and around the entrance. The overall setting evokes a secluded woodland retreat, blending harmoniously with the natural environment.
description: A large, rustic timber cabin with a dark gabled roof, surrounded by tall pine trees on a grassy plot. The cabin features multiple windows, a covered porch, and stone accents, evoking a woodland retreat.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from a side angle, showing the long facade with multiple grouped windows and the surrounding pine trees.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main entrance with a covered porch and the stone walkway leading up to it, framed by trees.
description_view_2: The rear of the cabin is visible, displaying additional windows and the extended roofline, with trees encircling the property.
description_view_3: A direct view of the opposite end of the cabin, showing a secondary entrance or porch area and the dense tree arrangement.
attribute_roof_type: complex gable roof with multiple intersecting sections and moderate overhangs, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple medium-sized rectangular windows arranged symmetrically in groups along the main facades, with some clustered beneath roof overhangs
attribute_door_placement: main entrance door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, with a possible secondary door at the rear or side
